sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94991" key="sklhro/khros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκληρό-κηρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n94991.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">overlaid with hard wax</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δέλτοι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zeno Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.67</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
